results.title: Recyclates Prices 2026 Uptrend Continues as Buyer Resistance Grows Amid US-Iran Conflict – Polymer Price Trends
results.description: European recyclate prices surged in April 2026 as the US-Iran conflict disrupted petrochemical supply chains and increased feedstock costs. Buyers are resisting higher prices, while polymer markets remain volatile amid supply shortages and rising energy costs. The post Recyclates Prices 2026 Uptrend Continues as Buyer Resistance Grows Amid US-Iran Conflict – Polymer Price Trends appeared first on Polyestertime .

results.title: Explosion at MOL’s Olefin 1 Plant in Tiszaújváros Leaves One Dead and Nine Injured
results.description: A deadly explosion at MOL Group’s Olefin 1 petrochemical plant in Tiszaújváros, Hungary, killed one person and injured nine others during a restart procedure. Investigators are examining the cause of the accident while the rest of the industrial complex remains operational. The post Explosion at MOL’s Olefin 1 Plant in Tiszaújváros Leaves One Dead and Nine Injured appeared first on Polyestertime .

results.title: Nylon Chain Cracks as Margin Squeeze Pushes DTY and CPL Prices Lower Amid US-Iran Conflict
results.description: The nylon market is facing growing pressure as shrinking margins drag DTY and caprolactam prices lower. The ongoing US-Iran conflict continues to disrupt energy and petrochemical markets, adding volatility to global nylon supply chains. The post Nylon Chain Cracks as Margin Squeeze Pushes DTY and CPL Prices Lower Amid US-Iran Conflict appeared first on Polyestertime .

results.title: Trump endorses Ty Masterson for Kansas governor
results.description: President Donald Trump endorsed Kansas Senate President Ty Masterson for governor of Kansas on Sunday, formalizing support for the Trump-aligned candidate. Trump cited Masterson’s record on the Second Amendment, cutting taxes, and keeping the border secure in the announcement, saying Masterson will “work tirelessly to Champion Kansas Values.” Masterson has been linked prominently to Trumpworld [...] The post Trump endorses Ty Masterson for Kansas governor appeared first on CBNC .

results.title: Greyparrot and Kenvue Advance Circular Packaging With AI-Powered Recycling Intelligence
results.description: Greyparrot and Kenvue have announced a strategic partnership to improve circular packaging through AI-powered waste intelligence. Using Greyparrot’s Deepnest platform, Kenvue will gain real-world recycling data to optimize packaging design, improve material recovery, and support sustainability goals globally. The post Greyparrot and Kenvue Advance Circular Packaging With AI-Powered Recycling Intelligence appeared first on Polyestertime .
